name: Sandbag Ladder

movements.notes: to one shoulder, may release one hand to show control; progressively heavier sandbags until failure to lift

source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2022/10 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; exact intermediate ladder increments between the confirmed endpoints (240-340 lb men, 160-250 lb women) are not confirmed from available sources -- flagged per CONTRIBUTING rather than guessed; tiebreak was a 3-sandbag toss over a yoke (100/150/200 lb men, 50/100/150 lb women)
